name: Regal Business Center
description: Premium corporate conference venue located in the heart of Delhi. Ideal for large scale corporate events, product launches, and annual general meetings. Features state-of-the-art audiovisual equipment and high-speed internet connectivity.

name: TechHub Meeting Spaces
description: Modern, fully-equipped meeting rooms designed for tech startups and corporate teams. Perfect for strategy sessions, client pitches, and team offsites.

name: Grand Exhibition Pavilion
description: Massive exhibition space suitable for trade shows, expos, and large corporate gatherings. Flexible layout options and dedicated event management team.

name: Serenity Corporate Retreat
description: Escape the city bustle at our premium corporate retreat. Designed for leadership offsites and team bonding, offering a perfect mix of work and relaxation.

name: Ocean View Resort
description: A breathtaking beachfront resort for premium corporate retreats and offsites. Create unforgettable memories with a stunning ocean backdrop.
